inputs.label: Star Formation Rate (R*)
inputs.businessContext: Average rate of star formation in our galaxy

inputs.label: Fraction with Planets (fp)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of stars that have planetary systems

inputs.label: Habitable Planets per Star (ne)
inputs.businessContext: Average number of planets that can support life per star with planets

inputs.label: Fraction where Life Appears (fl)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of habitable planets where life actually emerges

inputs.label: Fraction where Intelligence Evolves (fi)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of life-bearing planets where intelligent life develops

inputs.label: Fraction that Develop Technology (fc)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of civilizations that develop detectable technology

inputs.label: Lifetime of Civilization (L)
inputs.businessContext: Length of time such civilizations release detectable signals

formulas.N: R * fp * ne * fl * fi * fc * L

breakdown: N = R * fp * ne * fl * fi * fc * L
